query: X topic snooze global rollout For You timeline recent update availability

mako.raw:
{"query":"X topic snooze global rollout For You timeline recent update availability","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1861,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://sea.mashable.com/tech/44679/x-custom-timelines-what-users-are-saying-about-the-new-feature","title":"X custom timelines: What users are saying about the new feature","content":"Social media app X rolled out a new custom timeline feature earlier this week, and so far, user reactions have been positive.
Using the new custom timelines feature, X users will be able to create custom feeds for specific topics.
Nikita Bier, head of product at X, announced the rollout in a post on X and said that Android support would be coming soon.
Podcaster Aakash Gupta noted that the update lets users create up to "75 custom timelines powered by Grok." Gupta also speculated that the feature would give xAI a lot of new data for AI training."
In general, X users were excited to try the feature, though there was some confusion, which is typical with new-feature rollouts like this.
"Update your app," Bier wrote.
To a user who asked if it was possible to prevent topics from appearing in a feed, Bier pointed users to another new feature — the snooze topics feature, which rolled out at the same time as the custom feeds.
That feature is available now for iOS and web Premium users.
Most other comments on Bier's post were from users requesting specific topics, such as Ukraine, manufacturing, Bitcoin, and memes.
"I saw overlapping in between AI, Software and Tech.
Also seeing same content again and again on these timelines."},{"url":"https://socialbee.com/blog/twitter-updates/","title":"(July 8) 2026 X (Twitter) updates and news - SocialBee","content":"July 2026 X (Twitter) updates
X now displays posts with four or more images as carousels on desktop (web).
X is rolling out the ”Carousel Style” for multimedia posts to more users.
X has added the “Custom timelines” feature to the list of X Premium benefits.
X rolled out a new “History” tab for all users on iOS.
X has expanded globally the ability to snooze specific topics in the “For you” timeline.
Subscriber-only content highlights.
X is rolling out a new “For You” feed filter that allows users to choose the type of content they want to see.
X has removed the “Dim” theme mode.
X has launched a more intuitive and immersive video viewing experience on iOS.
X launched a standalone web app for X Chat.
X is testing a “Reader Mode” feature for its new web link experience.
X now allows users to sort reposts by “Top” and “Recent” on iOS.
X added on iOS a new feature for X Chat / X DMs, “Nicknames.” (source)
X added on desktop (web) a new feature for XChat, “Upload files from Google Drive“.
Twitter shares that it’s rolling out X Chat to all users.
